name: ProblemsWithEngineerAppointment
description: Customer is reporting a problem with an engineer or technician visit that was scheduled — the engineer didn't show up, arrived late, left without completing the work, or cancelled without notice. This is a post-appointment problem report, not a request to book, reschedule, confirm, or cancel an engineer visit.

sampleUtterances.utterance: The engineer {engineerProblemType}
My engineer was a {engineerProblemType}
I had an engineer booked but they {engineerProblemType}
The technician {engineerProblemType} for my appointment
Why didn't the engineer turn up?
I waited all day but the engineer {engineerProblemType}
Nobody came for my scheduled engineer visit
The engineer came but {engineerProblemType}
Can you explain why the engineer didn't come on the scheduled date?
I took a day off work for the engineer and they never showed
The engineer was supposed to be here this morning and it's now evening
My engineer appointment was {engineerProblemType} at the last minute

The installation engineer never arrived
I've had no communication about why the engineer didn't come

engineer didn't show up
